settings.heading: Trophy & Award Engraving Services
settings.subheading: Laser engraving and UV printing of names, logos, citations and dates on trophies, medals, plaques and mementos — on your pieces or ours. Crisp, permanent, included free with orders. Pan-India.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy provides laser engraving and UV printing of names, logos, citations and dates on trophies, medals and plaques — crisp and permanent, included free with our awards. We can also engrave items you already have. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.text: Engraving is what makes an award personal. We use laser engraving for crystal, glass, metal and wood, and UV printing for full-colour logos and photos on acrylic and wood. Recipient names, designations, citations, dates and brand logos are reproduced crisply and permanently — included free on awards bought from us, and available as a standalone service on suitable items you provide.

settings.title: Laser & UV printing
settings.text: Engraving for every material, plus full-colour printing.

settings.title: Names, logos & citations
settings.text: Individual personalisation from your name list.

settings.title: Free with our awards
settings.text: No extra engraving charge on orders from us.

settings.title: Bulk personalisation
settings.text: Each piece engraved individually at scale.

settings.title: Tell us what you need
settings.text: WhatsApp, call or fill the form with occasion, quantity, material and date.

settings.title: Get options & a quote
settings.text: We share designs, matching past work and a clear quote — usually same day.

settings.title: Approve proof & advance
settings.text: Sign off a digital mockup; 50% advance via UPI/transfer/card with GST invoice.

settings.title: Made & dispatched
settings.text: Crafted in our Bangalore workshop, QC'd and tracked to your venue.

settings.question: Is engraving included or extra?
settings.answer: It's free on awards you buy from us. Standalone engraving on items you provide is quoted per piece.

settings.question: Can you engrave each piece with a different name?
settings.answer: Yes — send a spreadsheet and we engrave each piece individually.

settings.question: What logo file works best?
settings.answer: A vector file (AI/SVG/PDF) gives the sharpest engraving; high-res PNG also works.

settings.question: Can you re-engrave a rolling trophy?
settings.answer: Yes — we add new winners to perpetual/rolling trophies.

settings.heading: Ready to start?
settings.text: Message us your requirement and event date — we'll guide you through and quote, usually within the hour.
